{{Quote|I trust the younger generation to bring about peace where we have failed, My fuel has been spent keeping what order I could. Fresh talent can now continue where I have left off.|Horox Ryyder announcing Zo Howler and Fo Kuna as his successors|<ref name="HoloNetNews" />}}
'''Fo Kuna''' was an [[Anx/Legends|Anx]]<ref name="HoloNetNews" /> with [[Color|pale-green]] skin.<ref name="Film II" /> By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="NewsDate">The [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:3:14 corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> Funa had become the [[Aide/Legends|aide]] for [[Zo Howler]], the former [[President/Legends|President]]<ref name="HoloNetNews" /> of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Savage Spirits">''[[Savage Spirits]]''</ref> [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]]<ref name="HoloNetNews" /> located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="Savage Spirits" />

That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="NewsDate" /> [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder]], who was serving as the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] for Gravlex Med in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], retired and named Howler and Kuna as his successors. A [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] report that detailed the retirement and the pair's appointment was released 13:3:21 of the [[Great ReSynchronization]] calender. The report went on to state that their senatorial duty on would begin on 13:3:30 and that they would continued Ryyder's campaign against the senate's proposed [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]].<ref name="HoloNetNews" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fo Kuna was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #48]], an [[in-universe]] news article published to the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] website on [[March 21]], [[2002]].<ref name="HoloNetNews" /> Kuna made was first pictured in {{Film|II}}<ref name="Film II" /> which was released on [[May 16]] of the same year.<ref name="Season 2 Directors">{{ThisWeek|u0Z7i0LnXOg|Mandalorian Season 2 Directors, We Celebrate a Birthday, and More!|sw_url=video/mandalorian-season-2-directors-we-celebrate-a-birthday-and-more}}</ref>
